critical_review_answers.quantity_matched_one_source: it cannot require divergence when the complete source-label-free carrier is preserved; repeated-S1 and repeated-S2 are mandatory scope diagnostics, and numerical equivalence alone has no R03 effect
critical_review_answers.I05_delta_scope: analysis_arithmetic_delta calibrates exact-rational parsing, float conversion, normalized-margin arithmetic, serialization, and reconstruction only; it supplies no runtime or measurement tolerance
critical_review_answers.response_window: the endpoint is six fixed slots with exactly one surface emission, one producer evaluation, and two step calls regardless of outcome
critical_review_answers.B_purity: registration requires empty queues, a matched B baseline, no B causal route/background/topology integration, and one response arrival as the only permitted B-targeting event; otherwise the response cannot register

decision.value_semantics: binary-like zero or one fixed registered response-packet amount; scheduling-and-arrival occurrence rather than graded magnitude
decision.primary_candidate: q1 and q2 both admitted to the registered common carrier within each mode, seed, and physical order
decision.primary_comparator: maximum oriented response of q1-admitted/q2-diverted and q2-admitted/q1-diverted symmetric leave-one branches
decision.comparator_reason: both source activities and physical contribution properties remain matched while each branch changes the mode-relevant common carrier; the maximum is a fixed strongest-marginal rule and is not chosen from observed effect size
decision.scope_diagnostic: repeated-S1 and repeated-S2 quantity-matched complete-carrier conditions in q1-then-q2 and q2-then-q1 physical orders
decision.scope_diagnostic_equivalence: allowed and non-failing when the complete causal carrier matches

operation_slots: capture B_before and empty packet/boundary-birth queue identities
capture B_after, queue identities, and event lineage
response_window_and_purity.scientific_zero: only a complete fixed window with no packet, no B-targeting event, and no B change
response_window_and_purity.operational_null: any exception, incomplete slot sequence, delayed arrival, residual queue, or non-response B change
purity_registration_duties: B baseline and response configuration exactly paired
packet and boundary-birth queues empty before and after
B distinct from B_ref and every response front-mask carrier
no B causal route, balancing operation, background update, topology integration, or unrelated B-targeting event
contributions, interventions, H_P/M_H materialization, and neutral contact complete before B_before

analysis_identity.responsibility: validate fixed-window response and B purity; select symmetric strongest leave-one; retain symmetric quantity scope; classify order/mode panels; validate I06 numeric admission; derive causal-chain status from provenance

calibration_identity.null_population: ten equal exact-rational response pairs spanning five seeds and two physical-order strata
calibration_identity.estimator: max(analysis_arithmetic_floor, maximum absolute matched-null normalized margin)
calibration_identity.mechanical_I05_gate: future entry point requires an I05 freeze recording owner acceptance of this I04R1 package, exactly one null invocation, candidate prohibition, and exact corrected identities

I06_numeric_admissibility.response_amount_rule: r >= 1024*1e-12 and r >= 1024*max(ulp(B_before), ulp(B_before+r)) for every branch
I06_numeric_admissibility.roundtrip_rule: B_before, r, and B_before+r finite, canonical-JSON round-trippable, and recomputed gain positive
I06_numeric_admissibility.runtime_tolerance_rule: every separately registered runtime/restoration/continuation tolerance is less than r/1024 and is never inferred from analysis_arithmetic_delta
I06_numeric_admissibility.failure_effect: configuration cannot register; changing the analysis floor or response reopens I04/I05

mode_registry.primary_pairing: combined P versus strongest symmetric leave-one P in both physical orders
mode_registry.order_interpretation: equal-P order invariance remains a mandatory control; top signature requires both order panels

mode_registry.causal_carrier: authoritative H_P through native M_H with P excluded from V
mode_registry.primary_pairing: combined H_P/M_H versus strongest symmetric leave-one H_P/M_H in both physical orders
mode_registry.order_interpretation: a valid OP-08-conditioned unequal panel may be order-conditioned or mixed and is not automatic hypothesis failure

mode_registry.causal_carrier: native P plus authoritative H_P through native M_H
mode_registry.primary_pairing: combined P+H_P/M_H versus strongest symmetric leave-one P+H_P/M_H in both physical orders
mode_registry.order_interpretation: a valid OP-08-conditioned unequal panel may be order-conditioned or mixed and is not automatic hypothesis failure

aggregation_and_decision_boundary.scientific_no_response: zero only after complete fixed window
aggregation_and_decision_boundary.operational_missingness: null; affected mode/seed/order tuple not evaluable; no imputation or denominator removal

candidate_status_derived_from: two distinct source-role arrivals into the common carrier
actual response front mask equal to the registered common carrier mask
absence of forbidden direct-response and contributor-addressed response calls
configuration, runtime-binding receipt, and call-trace identities
causal_chain_boundary.private_exclusion_derived_from: each actual response mask contained in exactly one private partition with no spanning or common aggregate
causal_chain_boundary.controller_exclusion_derived_from: forbidden response-phase call provenance or contributor-addressed response input

corrected_common_rule_changes: symmetric leave-one common-carrier admission owns the primary relation
quantity-matched repeated-S1/S2 is a scope diagnostic rather than aligned-all primary
private/controller exclusion uses evidence-derived causal-chain status

choice_rationale_quarantine.forbidden_choice_inputs: all I03 runtime-conformance observations, response values, assertion outcomes, branch outcomes, implementation comparators, and evidence digests

requires_new_I04_and_I05_cycle: raw response, orientation, fixed window, B-purity rule, or unit
primary candidate, symmetric leave-one comparator, physical-order strata, or quantity scope-diagnostic role
aggregation, missingness, margin, classifier, per-mode isolation, or causal-chain rule
analysis module or policy semantic identity
matched-null generator, analytic calibration identity, seeds, estimator, or floor
I06_may_bind_without_reopening_I04: exact graph topology and role IDs
scientific contribution amounts, types, timings, thresholds, and response amount inside the numeric admissibility domain
exact route/sink matching, carrier bounds, support, reserve, restoration manifests, and runtime tolerances
exact seven-cell subconfiguration identities consistent with this preregistration

gate_boundary.on_owner_acceptance: authorize checklist- and hypothesis-first I05 matched-null execution only
